name: Bombay Cashews
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grind the spice seeds in a grinder and place them in a large pan.
3. Add oil and remaining seasonings, and stir to mix.
4. Pour the nuts into the pan and coat well with the seasoning mixture.
5. Divide the nuts into two batches and spread on a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 20 minutes, stirring every 5 minutes until golden.
7. Serve warm or at room temperature. Cool completely before storing in an airtight container. Will keep about 2 weeks.
